query:
SELECT ag.id as groupId, ag.name as groupName, ag.menuItemId, mi.name as itemName, ao.id as optionId, ao.name as optionName, ao.price
FROM menu_addon_groups ag
JOIN menu_items mi ON ag.menuItemId = mi.id
JOIN menu_addon_options ao ON ao.addonGroupId = ag.id
WHERE mi.name LIKE '%Tradicional%' OR mi.name LIKE '%radicional%'
ORDER BY mi.name, ag.name, ao.name
LIMIT 50;

JOIN menu_addon_options ao ON ao.addonGroupId = ag.id
